attempts.strategy: Re-parameterize the entire free Čech resolution chain from (𝒰 : X.OpenCover)[Finite 𝒰.I₀] to a raw finite family {ι : Type u}[Finite ι](U : ι → Opens X) by PURE ADDITION (a parallel `section FamilyParameterized`), keeping all X.OpenCover decls byte-identical so CechBridge stays green. Mechanical substitution 𝒰.I₀↦ι, coverOpen 𝒰↦U, names↦…Fam.

attempts.goal_before: QuasiIso (cechFreeComplexAugFam U) over arbitrary finite family, no covering hypothesis
attempts.insight: The free Čech machinery is intrinsically cover-agnostic: 𝒰.f enters ONLY via coverOpen 𝒰 i := (𝒰.f i).opensRange; no ⊤/iSup/covering side-condition smuggled in. Delegation (thin wrappers := …Fam (coverOpen 𝒰)) was REJECTED — a one-layer unfold breaks CechBridge:251's `dsimp only [cechFreeSimplicial]` (Sigma.ι_desc can't fire). Pure addition keeps CechBridge byte-identical & green.

next_steps: Next iter (CechBridge family lane): re-prove injective_cech_acyclic over an arbitrary finite family, consuming cechFreeComplex_quasiIsoFam U + the …Fam supporting chain. This discharges BasisCovSystem.injective_acyclic over standard covers of arbitrary D(f), closing the iter-029 ⊤-vs-D(f) design fork.

findings.blocker: 01I8 step (1): affine global generation — producing σ : F.GeneratingSections (a global epi free I ⟶ F) for an arbitrary quasi-coherent F on Spec R. Load-bearing sub-fact Γ(D(f),F)=Γ(X,F)_f (localisation of qcoh sections, Stacks 01HV(4)) AND the qcoh abelian-subcategory closure (kernel σ.π qcoh) are BOTH absent from Mathlib (grep-confirmed: only Tilde.lean carries IsQuasicoherent). ~few-hundred LOC new affine sheaf theory.

attempts.strategy: Package 01I8 steps (2)–(3): two global generating families ⟹ IsIso fromTildeΓ. Bundle σ:F.GeneratingSections + τ:(kernel σ.π).GeneratingSections into F.Presentation, feed Mathlib isIso_fromTildeΓ_of_presentation.
attempts.lean_error: (initial) Application type mismatch: { generators := ?, relations := ? } has type SheafOfModules.Presentation.{0,0,0} of sort Type 1 but expected ... — fixed by building P in TACTIC mode (`have P : F.Presentation := …`) so universes are not defaulted to 0
attempts.insight: Term-mode anonymous constructor defaults Presentation universes to 0; tactic-mode `have P : F.Presentation := {…}` pins them. This is the formal content of 01I8 steps (2)–(3).

attempts.strategy: free_isQuasicoherent: recognise the free 𝒪_{Spec R}-module as qcoh (needed for step-2 kernel-is-qcoh).
attempts.code_tried: instance free_isQuasicoherent (ι) : (SheafOfModules.free.{u} (R := (Spec R).ringCatSheaf) ι).IsQuasicoherent := (SheafOfModules.isQuasicoherent.{u} (Spec R).ringCatSheaf).prop_of_iso (tildeFinsupp (R := R) ι) inferInstance
attempts.lean_error: (initial) universe-default mismatches — fixed by explicit .{u} pin
attempts.insight: free ι ≅ tilde (ι →₀ R) via tildeFinsupp + iso-closure; universe must be pinned .{u} (defaults to 0 otherwise).

attempts.lean_error: FAILED — only Modules/Tilde.lean carries IsQuasicoherent; no Γ(D(f),F)=Γ(X,F)_f, no globally-generated, no abelian-subcategory closure. loogle timed out.
attempts.goal_before: produce σ : F.GeneratingSections for qcoh F
attempts.insight: The only Mathlib routes to IsQuasicoherent (from Presentation / QuasicoherentData / iso-closure / of_coversTop) produce no GLOBAL generating family. This is genuinely the ~few-hundred-LOC affine global-generation theorem.

attempts.lean_error: failed to synthesize — qcoh is not a registered abelian subcategory in Mathlib; kernel-qcoh is downstream of step-1 local structure.
attempts.insight: Deliberately did NOT add a single-hypothesis reduction (∀ qcoh G, Nonempty G.GeneratingSections)→IsIso — it ALSO needs kernel-qcoh, so it relabels two gaps (iter-031 STUCK signal). Delivered the fully-provable two-generation reduction instead.

next_steps: Build affine global generation on Spec R: (a) localisation-of-sections Γ(D(f),F)≅(Γ(Spec R,F))_f for qcoh F (IsLocalizedModule form); (b) partition-of-unity / quasi-compactness assembly producing σ : F.GeneratingSections; (c) qcoh abelian-subcategory closure for kernel σ.π giving τ; then feed both to the ready isIso_fromTildeΓ_of_genSections. Do NOT re-dispatch as a Mathlib re-export or as a single-hypothesis relabel.
